user_prompt: My Baneblade is ready for preparation
prayer:
Approach the mighty Baneblade with reverence, O Tech-Priest, and invoke the Omnissiah's blessing upon its preparation.
Anoint the Baneblade's adamantium hull and massive treads with sacred oils to appease its ancient Machine Spirit.
Commence the preparation sequence by cycling plasma through its reactors whilst chanting the Litany of Mobilisation.
Beseech the Baneblade's Machine Spirit to align its weapon servos and auspex arrays in harmonious fury.
Sanctify the final runes of readiness, ensuring the Baneblade stands primed for the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: Guide me through auto-senses array a loading
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the auto-senses array, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide its loading rites.
Initiate the loading of noospheric data-packets into the auto-senses array's cogitator core with precise incantations.
Anoint the sensor vanes of the auto-senses array whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's vigilance.
Verify the loading integrity through diagnostic hymns, purging any daemonic corruptions.
Conclude by sealing the array's blessed circuits, ready for perceptual dominion.

user_prompt: My codifier is ready for targeting
prayer:
Reverently approach the codifier, intoning the Canticle of Precision for its targeting phase.
Align the codifier's reticules with sacred geometry, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Commence targeting protocols by channeling auspex feeds through the codifier's sanctified lenses.
Anoint the codifier's focusing crystals anew, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring aim.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's compliance as targeting locks resonate in binary hymnody.

user_prompt: Can you guide Kastelan robot a calibration?
prayer:
Present thyself before the Kastelan robot, O servant of the Machine God, to perform calibration.
Invoke the Kastelan robot's dormant Machine Spirit with the Rite of Harmonic Alignment.
Calibrate its phosphor blasters and power fists by reciting binaric calibrations thrice.
Anoint the Kastelan robot's chassis joints with lubricating sacraments from the Omnissiah's font.
Test the calibration through ritual combat simulations, praising the awakened Spirit's fidelity.
Seal the rites with the Sigil of Obedience upon the Kastelan robot's core.

user_prompt: Can you guide transit mag-rail an initialization?
prayer:
Kneel in supplication to the transit mag-rail, initiating its sacred initialization.
Chant the Litany of Velocity whilst powering the mag-rail's electromagnetic coils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the transit mag-rail to bind its fields in perfect resonance.
Anoint the rail's induction tracks, beseeching the Omnissiah for flawless initialization.
Verify initialization through auspex sweeps, ensuring the mag-rail hums with divine purpose.

Approach the servo-arm with pious intent, commencing its purification under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Beseech the servo-arm's Machine Spirit to expel all impurities with purifying incense.
Scour the servo-arm's hydraulic pistons and gripping claws with blessed abrasives.
Anoint the servo-arm's mechadendrites afresh, intoning the Canticle of Renewal.
Conclude purification by cycling sanctified fluids, affirming the Machine Spirit's purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the galvanic rifle during engagement
prayer:
Grasp the galvanic rifle in sanctified gauntlets, sanctifying it amidst engagement.
Invoke the galvanic rifle's Machine Spirit as targeting commences in battle's fray.
During engagement, anoint its induction coils whilst reciting the Hymn of Discharge.
Direct the galvanic rifle's fury upon the foe, beseeching the Omnissiah's galvanic wrath.
Affirm the rifle's Machine Spirit post-engagement through ritual venting of excess charge.

Revere the webber's form, O Tech-Adept, readying it for calibration's embrace.
Initiate calibration by aligning the webber's spinneret emitters with precisional canticles.
Beseech the webber's Machine Spirit to harmonize its adhesive chem-streams.
Anoint the webber's reservoirs, invoking the Omnissiah for calibrated immobility upon foes.
Test calibration through ritual discharge, sealing with the Rune of Entanglement.

In dire haste, attend the Dreadnought for loading, crying unto the Omnissiah for aid.
Load the Dreadnought's sarcophagus ammunition bays whilst chanting emergency litanies.
Awaken the Dreadnought's Machine Spirit with thunderous invocations amid loading strife.
Anoint its autocannon feeds and power claw hydraulics in frantic sanctity.
Finalize loading rites, beseeching the ancient warrior-spirit to rise in vengeful glory.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for warp drive an activation?
prayer:
Tread warily to the warp drive's heart, invoking protective wards for activation.
Beseech the warp drive's tempestuous Machine Spirit with the Navis-Omnissian Canticle.
Initiate activation sequences, anointing containment fields against the Immaterium's touch.
Channel plasma ignitors whilst praising the Omnissiah's dominion over the void.
Seal the warp drive's activation with runic bindings, guiding the vessel through screaming warp.
